---
pagetitle: "Natalia Gumińska, PhD"
description: >-
  Postdoctoral researcher in RNA biology and bioinformatics. Nanopore direct RNA
  sequencing, poly(A) tail biology, and open-source research software.
toc: false
anchor-sections: false
---

::: {.hero}
<div>
<span class="eyebrow">RNA biology · Research software · Data visualisation</span>

<h1 class="hero-title">Natalia Gumińska, PhD</h1>

<p class="hero-role">Postdoctoral researcher · Laboratory of RNA Biology (ERA Chairs Group) · IIMCB Warsaw</p>

<p class="hero-summary">
I study RNA tails: how long they are, what they are made of, and how to measure
both reliably. I wrote <a href="https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/ninetails">ninetails</a>,
which finds the residues in a poly(A) tail that are not adenosine.
</p>

<div class="btn-row">
  <a class="btn-cta" href="software.qmd"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i> Software</a>
  <a class="btn-ghost" href="publications/index.qmd"><i class="bi bi-journal-text"></i> Publications</a>
  <a class="btn-ghost" href="contact.qmd"><i class="bi bi-envelope"></i> Contact</a>
</div>

<ul class="hero-facts">
  <li><i class="bi bi-geo-alt"></i> Warsaw, Poland</li>
  <li><i class="bi bi-building"></i> IIMCB</li>
  <li><i class="bi bi-braces"></i> R · Python · SQL</li>
</ul>
</div>

<div>

```{=html}
<!-- Replace with a real photograph. A square or 4:5 JPEG at roughly 800px on
     the long edge is plenty; update the src and the alt text and nothing else
     needs to change. -->
<img class="hero-portrait" src="assets/img/profile.svg"
     alt="Portrait of Natalia Gumińska">
```

</div>
:::

## What I do

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-dna"></i></span>

### Research
Poly(A) tail dynamics and RNA metabolism, read off nanopore signal. Earlier work
on introns and circular DNA in euglenids.
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-code-square"></i></span>

### Research software
R packages for long-read analysis, a deep-learning classifier for tail
composition, and the laboratory's sequencing metadata databases.
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
<span class="card-icon"><i class="bi bi-easel"></i></span>

### Scientific illustration
Figures, schematics and graphical abstracts, and the logo for the
[DEGRONOPEDIA](https://degronopedia.com/) web server.
:::
:::

## Currently

::: {.highlight-box .reveal}
Postdoctoral researcher in the **Laboratory of RNA Biology (ERA Chairs Group)**
at the **International Institute of Molecular and Cell Biology in Warsaw**, since
2020. Currently finishing postgraduate studies in Python Data Science
Engineering at Koźminski University.
:::

## Selected work

::: {.card-grid}
::: {.u-card .reveal .d1}
### ninetails <span class="status-badge status-active">author</span>
Finds non-adenosine residues in poly(A) tails from nanopore direct RNA reads.
Published in *Nature Communications* (2025).

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.pill} [Nanopore]{.pill} [Deep learning]{.pill}
:::

[Repository](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB/ninetails){.btn-ghost}
[Docs](https://lrb-iimcb.github.io/ninetails/){.btn-ghost}
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d2}
### nanotail2 <span class="status-badge status-active">author</span>
Poly(A) tail length analysis: distributions, comparisons and figures. The
length counterpart to ninetails.

::: {.tag-row}
[R]{.pill} [Statistics]{.pill} [ggplot2]{.pill}
:::

[Organisation](https://github.com/LRB-IIMCB){.btn-ghost}
:::

::: {.u-card .reveal .d3}
### Laboratory databases <span class="status-badge status-maintained">maintained</span>
Relational schemas for samples, libraries and sequencing runs, with an audit
trail.

::: {.tag-row}
[SQL]{.pill} [Schema design]{.pill}
:::

[More on Software](software.qmd){.btn-ghost}
:::
:::
